title: Amtech T1140 4 Digit Combination Padlock Black

features: DURABLE: This corrosion resistant combination padlock has a 6mm hardened steel shackle and a secure 4 digit combination lock
VERSATILE: It is ideal for securing luggage, suitcases, sports bags, rucksacks, lockers, cupboards, tool boxes, etc
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details.
